name: AREthRemoveEventFromEventgroup
title: AREthRemoveEventFromEventgroup
syntax: long AREthRemoveEventFromEventgroup( dword pevgHandle, dword pevHandle );
description: Removes an Event created by AREthAddEvent from an Event Group which was created by AREthAddProvidedEventGroup. The Event itself is not deleted.

parameters.name: pevgHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Event Group from which an Event should be removed (see AREthAddProvidedEventGroup).

parameters.name: pevHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Event that should be removed from the Event Group (see AREthAddEvent)

return: Handle of the Event Group from which an Event should be
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
